{{Infobox group
| name = Imperial Guard
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Imperial Guard Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperial]] Guard is a highly numerous and widespread [[Imperial]] [[Guild]] responsible for security, patrolling, and maintaining order within the [[Empire]]. They are most notably tasked with protecting [[the Emperor]] and securing the [[Imperial Palace]], where they monitor entrances, rooftops, and windows. While some elite guilds view them as having lower entry requirements suited for mundane tasks like settling riots or guarding storehouses, the Guard is recognized for its extreme alertness and ability to detect intruders. They are considered a highly loyal organization, though their continued existence is tied directly to the presence of an [[Emperor]]. Members of the [[Guild]] wear distinctive red-and-black uniforms featuring the [[Aurelian]] Shield crest. A defining characteristic of the Guard is that their members undergo a secret alchemical and [[Reading]] process to replace body parts with [[Kameira]]-based enhancements. These modifications—which can include reptilian arms, eagle eyes, tentacles, or feathered ears—grant them enhanced physical abilities but also serve to bind them to the [[Guild]]. The organization is led by [[General Jarelys Teach]], a powerful figure who rose to command through combat and possesses heightened strength despite appearing human. The Guard's presence is often seen as a sign that serious matters are underway, and they are known for their intense dedication to protecting their charge.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Led by [[Jarelys Teach]], the [[Imperial]] Guard is a group of individuals wearing pressed red-and-black uniforms adorned with a golden shield crest bearing the [[Imperial Seal]]. Funded by the resources of the [[Imperial Palace]], these soldiers—some of whom possess mismatched body parts—have helped restore order to the [[Capital]]. While they can be requisitioned by any prison in the city during emergencies, the organization is noted to have stories of rebels and traitors, and it faces collapse in the absence of an [[Emperor]]. During their service, the Guard has called for the [[Captain]] and carried out an invasion of [[The Testament]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Imperial Guard]] wears red-and-black pressed uniforms marked with a crest.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Imperial Guard]]'s crest is a golden shield marked with the [[Imperial Seal]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Imperial Palace]]'s resources were used for keeping the [[Capital]] running and funding the [[Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Imperial Guard]] helped restore order to the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Imperial Guards]] can be requisitioned by any prison in the [[Capital]] during an emergency.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c13">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Imperial Guard]] is a group led by [[Jarelys Teach]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Head of the Imperial Guard]] is [[Jarelys Teach]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Imperial Guard]] will fall apart without an [[Emperor]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Imperial Guard]] is a group of people in red-and-black uniforms and mismatched body parts.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Imperial Guard]] called for the [[Captain]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Imperial Guard]] invaded [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Imperial Guard]] has stories of traitors and rebels.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Imperial]] Guard is a group identified by [[Fletcher]] as being far too valuable to disturb. Bearing the [[Aurelian]] Shield as their crest, these members work alongside various troops to restore order. The group's history is personal to [[Ayana]], as both of her parents were members of the unit. One notable member possesses muscular reptilian replacements for arms. Following an attack on [[the Emperor]]'s chambers, the Guard conducted a search to locate him.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Imperial Guard]] is a group that [[Fletcher]] considers too valuable to bother.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Imperial Guard]] works with the troops to restore order.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Ayana]]'s parents were members of the [[Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|An [[Imperial Guard]] has muscular reptilian replacements for arms.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Imperial Guard]] searched for [[the Emperor]] after his chambers were attacked.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Imperial Guard]] crest is the [[Aurelian]] Shield.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|As members of the Imperialist alliance, the [[Imperial]] Guard launched an attack on the location. During the events surrounding [[Bliss]]'s entry into the palace, a guard possessing orange cat eyes offered a salute to [[Jarelys Teach]]. Within the building, a goat-legged member of the unit was present, and the group included a blond captain. Additionally, the [[Imperial]] Guard provided an escort for [[Calder]] as he moved through the halls.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Imperial Guard]] is attacking the location.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Imperial Guard]] is required for [[Bliss]] to enter the palace.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|An [[Imperial Guard]] with orange cat eyes salutes [[Jarelys Teach]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Imperial Guard]] is part of the Imperialist alliance.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Imperial Guard]] escorted [[Calder]] through the halls.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A goat-legged [[Imperial Guard]] was in the building.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Imperial Guard]] includes a blond captain.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Imperial]] Guard is a high-status combatant group composed of uniformed men and women who secure the borders of the Palace. Serving as guards for [[the Emperor]], these individuals often have their body parts replaced with [[Kameira]] equivalents. Members of this group include [[Jarelys Teach]], and even the assassins have been known to possess [[Imperial]] Guard blood. During various events, members such as an individual with orange eyes or one with wide owl's eyes have been observed, while the group's leaders have signed letters of personal regret. The influence of the guard is seen in others, such as [[Lucan]] who salutes like them, and [[Jyrine]], whose clothing resembles a secondhand uniform.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Imperial Guard]] is a group [[Shera]] could be carried away by.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Imperial Guard]] are guards for [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Imperial Guard]] is a group that [[Lucan]] suggests alerting.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|One of the assassins has [[Imperial Guard]] blood.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Imperial Guard]] secures the borders of the Palace.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|An [[Imperial Guard]] with orange eyes was running away and shouting orders.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Imperial Guard]] members have body parts replaced with [[Kameira]] equivalents.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Imperial Guard]] is composed of men and women in uniform.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Jyrine]]'s clothes resembled a secondhand [[Imperial Guard]] uniform.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|An [[Imperial Guard]] with wide owl's eyes was among the crowd of humans behind [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] salutes like the [[Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Heads of the [[Imperial Guard]] signed a letter of personal regret.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Jarelys Teach]] is of the [[Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Head of the Imperial Guard]] is a high-status combatant.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21" />}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|As a military force stationed in the [[Capital]], the [[Imperial]] Guard is composed of diverse members possessing enhanced senses, including individuals with fox ears, tusks, or scaled arms. Clad in impressive red-and-black uniforms that utilize [[Kameira enhancements]], these soldiers are significantly larger than [[Calder]], whom they accompany. The unit is tasked with guarding the [[Rose Tower]] and remains stationed outside [[the Emperor]]’s chambers, supported by specialized doctors trained in unusual biology. During the defense of [[The Testament]], most of the troops are comprised of the [[Imperial]] Guard, a group upon whom [[Calder]] eventually places bets alongside the [[Champions]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial Guard]] has enhanced senses.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|One [[Imperial Guard]] has tusks.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|One [[Imperial Guard]] has scaled arms.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial Guards]] are accompanying [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial Guard]] wears red-and-black uniforms and utilizes [[Kameira enhancements]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Imperial Guard]] guard the [[Rose Tower]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial Guard]] includes members with fox ears.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial Guard]] is gathered outside the main door of the [[Rose Tower]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The average [[Imperial Guard]] is significantly larger than [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial Guard]] includes doctors who are used to dealing with patients with unusual biology.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial Guard]] is stationed outside [[the Emperor]]’s chambers.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial Guard]] has a specific uniform that impresses people.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] bets on the [[Champions]] and the [[Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Most of the troops defending [[The Testament]] are part of the [[Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial Guard]] is a military force in the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperial]] Guard provides open security for the Imperialist forces, maintaining a massive presence where their uniforms are worn by thousands of people. While they are numerous and spread throughout the realm, their patrols can occasionally be overwhelmed by packs of scavengers. The group is responsible for securing the tunnels of the [[Imperial Palace]] and conducting regular inspections. During specific encounters, such as when [[Shera]] arrived at the wall, teams of guards stand alongside [[Magisters]]. Additionally, the [[Imperial]] Guard is the lineage from which [[Ayana]] inherited [[Kameira blood]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperial Guard]] performs open security for the Imperialist side.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Imperial Guard]] patrols can be overwhelmed by packs of scavengers.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperial Guard]] secures the tunnels of the [[Imperial Palace]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperial Guard]] are numerous and spread everywhere.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A team of [[Magisters]] and [[Imperial Guards]] awaited [[Shera]] on the wall.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperial Guard]] conducts inspections.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A group of [[Trip]]'s friends from the [[Imperial Guard]] spotted him.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperial Guard]] uniform is worn by thousands of people.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperial Guard]] is the group from which [[Ayana]] inherited [[Kameira blood]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Without an Emperor, the Imperial Guard will eventually fall apart.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
